zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Burgoyne於大約1525年出生在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓時，她的父親Sir Christopher Burgoyne52歲，母親Thomasine Freville53歲。她於大約1555年與Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年5月5日之後在英國。

zh-hans.Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾坎布利其

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Burgoyne于大约1525年出生在英国坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Burgoyne52岁，母亲Thomasine Freville53岁。她于大约1555年与Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench在英国英格兰坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年5月5日之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Burgoyne was born about 1525, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, was 52 and her mother, Thomasine Freville, was 53. She married Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench about 1555, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 5 May 1590, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Burgoyne est née environ 1525, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Freville, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench environ 1555, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 5 mai 1590, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Burgoyne um 1525 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Burgoyne 52 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Freville 53. Sie hat um 1555 in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 5. Mai 1590 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Burgoyne è nata il circa 1525 nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Freville, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench circa 1555, nel Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 5 maggio 1590, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Burgoyneが約1525年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Burgoyneは52歳，母Thomasine Frevilleは53歳であった。約1555年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンでHon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Benchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年5月5日以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Burgoyne(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Burgoyne(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Freville(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 대략 1555년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 5월 5일 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1525–after 5 May 1590: ойролцоогоор 1525 он–1590 оны Тавдугаар сарын 5–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Burgoyne nasceu aproximadamente 1525, em Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Freville, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench aproximadamente 1555, em Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 5 de maio de 1590, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Burgoyne родилась около 1525 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Burgoyne было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Freville, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench около 1555 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 5 май 1590 г. в местности Англия.

sm.about 1525–after 5 May 1590: e tusa o le 1525–ina ua ma'ea le 5 Me 1590

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine Burgoyne nació aproximadamente 1525, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher Burgoyne, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Thomasine Freville, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Hon. Robert Shute Justice of the King's Bench aproximadamente 1555, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 5 de mayo de 1590, en Inglaterra.
